/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/drone_control__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/quadrotor_msgs/msg/detail/trajectory_point__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/quadrotor/ros2_ws/build/quadrotor_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libquadrotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
